summary: Highly regarded audience recording praised as the best‑sounding of its group.
review: Reviewers describe this tape as the best‑sounding audience source they’ve heard, noting a clear and well‑balanced mix that captures the concert nicely. No specific comments on the musical performance are provided, so the show itself cannot be evaluated from the available feedback.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief positive review (4 stars) focusing on recording quality; no information on performance, so rating reflects the high praise for sound but limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best‑sounding among similar audience recordings – clear, balanced and well captured.
